news.headline: TEAMS: Hawks make Gunston call among four changes, Crows guns return
news.body: The teams are in for Thursday night's clash between Hawthorn and Kuwarna at UTAS Stadium

news.headline: Inaugural Saint to hand over captaincy reins after six seasons at the helm
news.body: Hannah Priest has handed over the reins after six seasons

news.headline: Crows guns return but not all will face Hawks
news.body: Riley Thilthorpe and Callum Ah Chee will strengthen Adelaide but Taylor Walker to play SANFL

news.headline: Fagan's message to out-of-form midfield stars ahead of Giants test
news.body: Chris Fagan urges his star midfielder to get back to basics for their game against GWS

news.headline: AFL Chairman Craig Drummond congratulates Scott Pendlebury
news.body: The AFL Commission Chairman has passed on his congratulations to Collingwood's Scott Pendlebury as he breaks the all-time VFL/AFL games record

news.headline: 'There's emotion attached': Power gun still uncertain on future call
news.body: As his contract end nears, Zak Butters says he needs to 'start having conversations' about his choices

news.headline: Pies prepare for the worst after 'sad' injury, defend resting Pendlebury
news.body: Craig McRae says the club suspects Oscar Steene has sustained an ACL injury

news.headline: Cooper Lord — OUT: Concussion (1-2 weeks)
news.body: Cooper Lord (Carlton) has been ruled OUT with a concussion; estimated return 1-2 weeks. Expect a price dip - trade or bench until they return.

news.body: Harry Perryman (Collingwood) has been ruled OUT with a hamstring; estimated return 2-3 weeks. Expect a price dip - trade or bench until they return.

news.headline: Cooper Lord ruled out
news.body: Cooper Lord is on the sidelines with a concussion; expect a price dip while he's out.

news.headline: Harry Perryman set to miss
news.body: Word is Harry Perryman won't take his place after copping a hamstring; out 2-3 weeks. Likely a trade-out until he's right.

news.headline: Jordan Ridley sidelined
news.body: Jordan Ridley won't feature, troubled by a calf. One to move on from for now.

news.headline: Hayden Young sidelined
news.body: Hayden Young won't feature, troubled by a concussion. One to move on from for now.

news.headline: Blow for Leek Aleer
news.body: Leek Aleer is set to miss this week with an ankle; line up cover at selection.

news.headline: Isaac Cumming under an injury cloud
news.body: Isaac Cumming is in doubt after a hamstring complaint; keep an eye on selection news this week.

news.headline: Watch: Jarrod Berry
news.body: Whispers Jarrod Berry is racing the clock on a calf ahead of the weekend — risky to lock in.

news.headline: Watch: Dayne Zorko
news.body: Whispers Dayne Zorko is racing the clock on a soreness ahead of the weekend — risky to lock in.

news.headline: Doubt over Adam Saad
news.body: Adam Saad pulled up sore with a hamstring and is in doubt for this week.

news.headline: Watch: Corey Wagner
news.body: Whispers Corey Wagner is racing the clock on an adductor ahead of the weekend — risky to lock in.
